title: osbuild-composer security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[101.4-3.0.1]
- Support using repository definitons with OCI variables [JIRA: OLDIS-38657]
- Update repositories to contain OCI variables
- Remove image types Minimal-raw and wsl [JIRA: OLDIS-38123]
- Increase default /boot size to 1GB [Orabug: 36827079]
- support for building OL8/9 images on Oracle Linux 8 [Orabug: 36400619]

[101.4-3]
- Rebuilt to fix:
  - CVE-2025-61729
  - RHEL-140539
full_text:
[101.4-3.0.1]
- Support using repository definitons with OCI variables [JIRA: OLDIS-38657]
- Update repositories to contain OCI variables
- Remove image types Minimal-raw and wsl [JIRA: OLDIS-38123]
- Increase default /boot size to 1GB [Orabug: 36827079]
- support for building OL8/9 images on Oracle Linux 8 [Orabug: 36400619]

[101.4-3]
- Rebuilt to fix:
  - CVE-2025-61729
  - RHEL-140539

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2124.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-61729.html
